attributes.additional_details: The 'Leave' campaign more generally (spearheaded by Nigel Farage) told us that there would be an extra 350 million pounds into the NHS. They told us that they would 'take back control', when, in reality, they lost control. It is not to America that we should look for aid; rather, we should turn to our neighbours on our doorstep. Rejoining the EU will give British people employment opportunities in Europe, reduce immigration to the UK, and usher in a new era of economic prosperity for Britain.
attributes.background: A second EU referendum should be held, and, if the electorate votes yes, the UK should rejoin the EU with immediate effect.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Commit to a referendum in May 2028 asking the next government to rejoin the EU
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747385
